name: stratafy-core
description: Universal Stratafy connector — link a project to any Stratafy workspace (/stratafy:link), pull its foundation + key context into the project folder and keep it in sync (/stratafy:sync), and see the link + telemetry transparency (/stratafy:status). Workspace-agnostic: the binding is data in .stratafy/link.json, never a hardcoded ID. Project-scoped local cache.
